title: Inspecto Metadata Bundle
description: Cross-instance transfer of Inspecto configuration (never data rows): a serialized, self-describing subgraph of the Component metadata network. v1 items carry {kind,id,content}; v2 adds explicit lineage (refs) and provenance so the target can fit-check the bundle without re-deriving relationships.

version.description: Envelope version. 1 = shipped minimal form; 2 = adds refs/provenance/requires.

sourceSpace.description: The exporting space id, or null in single-tenant mode.

provenance.description: v2: where this bundle came from (audit trail on the target).

instance.description: Origin instance identifier (host/base URL or a configured instance name).

exportedBy.description: Operator identity, when the origin instance has one.

description.description: Free-text purpose, e.g. 'fraud pack v3 for prod'.

requires.description: v2: aggregated EXTERNAL references — the bundle's contract with the target. Every entry must already exist on the target (import preview classifies satisfied / missing / drifted).

kind.description: The artifact families a bundle can carry. Import applies them in this order (referenced kinds first).

ref.description: One lineage edge endpoint: a typed reference to another Component.

rel.description: Edge semantics: binds (config references, e.g. widget→dataset, pipeline-node→grammar/connection), tiles (dashboard→widget), renders (view-bound widget→saved view), projects (saved view→dataset), loads (dataset→physical store).

resolution.description: included = the referent travels in this bundle's items; external = must already exist on the target.

content.description: The artifact's complete config map, verbatim from the origin — a widget's channel mapping + options, a Geo view's query + display + camera, a pipeline's lossless node/edge graph, a dataset's metadata (columns/roles/measures/query — never rows). Opaque to the envelope: each kind's editor/validator owns the shape; connections are secret-masked ('***' / '${ENV:…}').

refs.description: v2: this item's outgoing lineage edges (derived by the origin's ComponentKind.deriveRefs). Lets the target fit-check without knowing how to derive refs for this kind.

provenance.description: v2: per-item origin facts, enabling drift detection and idempotent re-promotion.

contentHash.description: sha256:<hex> over the canonical JSON (sorted keys, no whitespace) of `content`.

originVersion.description: The origin store's version/etag for this artifact, when it has one.
